cards.name: Dumbo - The Flying Elephant
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
AERIAL DUO When you play this character, chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Alice - Accidentally Adrift
cards.cardText:
WASHED AWAY When you play this character, you may put chosen item into its player's inkwell facedown and exerted.
MAKING WAVES Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

cards.name: The Queen - Conceited Ruler
cards.cardText:
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
ROYAL SUMMONS At the start of your turn, you may choose and discard a Princess or Queen character card to return a character card from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Maleficent - Monstrous Dragon
cards.cardText:
DRAGON FIRE When you play this character, you may banish chosen character.

The ninth Rule of Villainy: When all else fails, turn into a dragon.

cards.name: Maleficent - Monstrous Dragon
cards.cardText: DRAGON FIRE When you play this character, you may banish chosen character.

cards.name: Elsa - The Fifth Spirit
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
CRYSTALLIZE When you play this character, exert chosen opposing character.

cards.name: Cursed Merfolk - Ursula's Handiwork
cards.cardText:
POOR SOULS Whenever this character is challenged, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

"Now it's happened once or twice, someone couldn't pay the price..."
—Ursula

cards.name: Strength of a Raging Fire
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Deal damage to chosen character equal to the number of characters you have in play.

Tranquil as a forest
But on fire within

cards.name: Sisu - Daring Visitor
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
BRING ON THE HEAT! When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 1 {S} or less.

"Come on—what's the worst that can happen?"

cards.name: Mickey Mouse - True Friend
cards.cardText:
As long as he's around, newcomers to the Great
Illuminariy will always get a warm welcome.

cards.name: Tinker Bell - Giant Fairy
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Tinker Bell.)
ROCK THE BOAT When you play this character, deal 1 damage to each opposing character.
PUN PIRATE! During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may deal 2 damage to chosen opposing character.

cards.name: The Queen - Mirror Seeker
cards.cardText:
CALCULATING AND VAIN Whenever this character quests, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.

She has only one question, and she'd better like the answer.

cards.name: Mickey Mouse - Pirate Captain
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mickey Mouse.)
MARINER'S MIGHT Whenever this character quests, chosen Pirate character gets +2 {S} and gains "This character takes no damage from challenges" this turn.

cards.name: Goofy - Expert Shipwright
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
CLEVER DESIGN Whenever this character quests, chosen character gains Ward until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Donald Duck - Buccaneer
cards.cardText:
BOARDING PARTY During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, your other characters get +1 {L} this turn.

Nobody stands a chance against the daring duck of the high seas!

cards.name: Daisy Duck - Pirate Captain
cards.cardText:
DISTANT SHORES Whenever one of your Pirate characters quests while at a location, draw a card.

"The answers we're looking for are on the other side of that maze, I just know it!"

cards.name: Minnie Mouse - Pirate Lookout
cards.cardText:
LAND, HO! Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may return a location card from your discard to your hand.

Minnie leaned forward. Could it be true? Was this the island at last?

cards.name: Zeus - Missing His Spark
cards.cardText:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
I NEED MORE THUNDERBOLTS! While there’s a card under this character, he gets +2 {S} and +2 {W}.

cards.name: The Great Illuminary - Abandoned Laboratory
cards.cardText:
STARTLING DISCOVERY Characters gain " — Draw a card" while here.

Remember, we're looking for clues to who tore up the lorebook pages. —Elisa Maza

cards.name: The Horseman Strikes!
cards.cardText:
Draw a card. You may banish chosen character with Evasive.

Just when you thought you'd escaped...

cards.name: Scar - Eerily Prepared
cards.cardText:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
SURVIVAL OF THE FITTEST Whenever you put a card under this character, chosen opposing character gets -5 {S} this turn.

cards.name: Elsa - Exploring the Unknown
cards.cardText:
CLOSER LOOK When you play this character, you may draw a card.

"This world still has secrets to uncover."

cards.name: Daisy Duck - Paranormal Investigator
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Daisy Duck.)
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
STRANGE HAPPENINGS While this character is exerted, cards enter opponents' inkwells exerted.

cards.name: Daisy Duck - Paranormal Investigator
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Daisy Duck.)
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
STRANGE HAPPENINGS While this character is exerted, cards enter opponents' inkwells exerted.

cards.name: Goofy - Emerald Champion
cards.cardText:
EVEN THE SCORE Whenever one of your other Emerald characters is challenged and banished, banish the challenging character.
PROVIDE COVER Your other Emerald characters gain Ward. (Opponents can’t choose them except to challenge.)

cards.name: Jasmine - Soothing Princess
cards.cardText:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
UPLIFTING AURA Whenever this character quests, if there’s a card under her, remove up to 3 damage from each of your characters.

cards.name: Putting It All Together
cards.cardText:
Chosen opposing character can't challenge during their next turn. Draw a card.

"Stop! It's Hopps and Wilde! We have questions!"
—Judy Hopps

cards.name: Gramma Tala - Connected to Nature
cards.cardText:
ANCESTORS' GIFT For each card in your inkwell, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.

"Ice fishing? No, no—this is ice feeding!"

cards.name: White Rabbit - Late Again
cards.cardText:
UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

cards.name: Elisa Maza - Transformed Gargoyle
cards.cardText:
FOREVER STRONG Your characters' {S} can't be reduced below their printed value.
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

"I'll never get the hang of jumping off rooftops."

cards.name: Beast - Snowfield Troublemaker
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
DYNAMIC MANEUVER Whenever this character challenges, if he’s at a location, he takes no damage from the challenge.

cards.name: Timon - Snowball Swiper
cards.cardText:
GET RID OF THAT When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a non-character card of your choice.

"Okay, Pumbaa—hit it!"

cards.name: Tinker Bell - Snowflake Collector
cards.cardText:
FLURRY OF DELIGHT While you have 4 or more cards in your hand, this character gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
SPECTACULAR FIND While you have 7 or more cards in your hand, this character gets +3 {L}.

cards.name: Tinker Bell - Snowflake Collector
cards.cardText:
FLURRY OF DELIGHT While you have 4 or more cards in your hand, this character gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
SPECTACULAR FIND While you have 7 or more cards in your hand, this character gets +3 {L}.

cards.name: Stitch - High Badness Level
cards.cardText:
AMPED UP While you have a character named Lilo in play, this character gains Challenger +3. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)

"No more caffeine for you."
–Lilo

cards.name: Scrooge McDuck - S.H.U.S.H. Agent
cards.cardText:
BACKUP PLAN When you play this character, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
ON THE MOVE When this character is challenged, return this card to your hand. (No damage is dealt in that challenge.)

cards.name: Belle - Apprentice Inventor
cards.cardText:
WHAT A MESS During your turn, you may banish chosen item of yours to play this character for free.

Helping her dad keep the flying debris to a minimum.

cards.name: Mulan - Disguised Soldier
cards.cardText:
WHERE DO I SIGN IN? When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

"Okay this is it, time to show 'em your man walk."
—Mushu

cards.name: Goofy - Set for Adventure
cards.cardText: FAMILY VACATION Once during your turn, whenever this character moves to a location, you may move one of your other characters to that location for free. If you do, draw a card.

cards.name: Beast - Gracious Prince
cards.cardText:
FULL DANCE CARD Your Princess characters get +1 {S} and +1 {W}.

His heart warmed as the music began and the dancers took their places.

cards.name: Belle - Accomplished Mystic
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Belle.)
ENHANCED HEALING When you play this character, move up to 3 damage counters from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

The mixed ink had changed more than just the rose.

cards.name: Stitch - Carefree Snowboarder
cards.cardText:
BRING YOUR FRIENDS Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other characters in play, you may draw a card.

"First one down the mountain gets all the marshmallows for their cocoa!"
—Lilo

cards.name: Ariel - Curious Traveler
cards.cardText:
FAMILIAR GROUND Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able.

"Isn't it wonderful? See if there's anything that catches your eye."

cards.name: Maleficent - Imperious Traveler
cards.cardText:
HEED MY WORDS Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may exert chosen opposing character.

"Bind this glimmer, fiendish flowers!"

cards.name: Cruella De Vil - Judgmental Traveler
cards.cardText:
YOU'RE OUT OF FASHION Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may banish chosen damaged character.

"Can I help you? Not with your sense of style, darling."

cards.name: Queen Of Hearts - Impatient Traveler
cards.cardText:
ROYAL COMMAND Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they’re played.)

Hours of walking in the heat had not improved her rosy disposition.

cards.name: Cinderella - Resourceful Traveler
cards.cardText:
THIS AND THAT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

No matter how difficult the journey, she always takes care of her friends.

cards.name: Pocahontas - Steadfast Traveler
cards.cardText:
WANDERING SPIRIT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.

"Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one."
—Grandmother Willow
